message:
Running command: # Step 46 (GlobalPlacement) has a complete state_out.json and ODB - clean checkpoint
# Step 50 incomplete - need to delete it so librelane can re-run from step 49 or 50
# First check what step 47,48,49 look like (did they complete?)
for step in 47 48 49; do
    echo "=== Step $step ==="
    ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/${step}-* 2>/dev/null | grep -E "state_out|runtime|\.odb" | head -3
done
